memory:memory/2026-04-17.md:1:12.snippet: # 2026-04-17 - The root `MEMORY.md` was discovered missing after the session history was lost when the PC went into standby. - Searched for old memory copies. `Intel/memory.md` exists but only contained a test line, so it was not useful as a real recovery source. - Recovered Apollo continuity from `projects/apollo/` control docs and from the archived session note `legacy/Intel/workspace/memory/2026-04-16-lightrag-ingestion.md`. - Rebuilt a fresh root `MEMORY.md` with the durable Apollo context and continuity rules. - Added a `memory/backups/` backup path and a simple backup script so future `MEMORY.md` changes can be mirrored. - Updated `AGENTS.md` with instructions to restore `MEMORY.md` f

memory:memory/2026-04-17.md:10:20.snippet: - The user added a new workspace rule: before modifying core project/runtime files like `docker-compose.yaml`, `apollo_up.bat`, `apollo_down.bat`, `.env`, and similar files, create dated/versioned backups in `legacy/Backups/`. - Seeded `legacy/Backups/` with backups of `docker-compose.yaml`, `apollo_up.bat`, `apollo_down.bat`, `.env`, and `AGENTS.md`, and added `scripts/backup_core_project_files.sh` to make that easier to follow consistently. - Backed up `docker-compose.yaml` and `.env` again as `v2` snapshots before hardening them. - Hardened `docker-compose.yaml` with restart policies, `init: true`, graceful stop periods, and core service healthchecks, while keeping remote-access port expo

memory:memory/2026-04-17.md:33:42.snippet: - Backed up `docker-compose.yaml` and `.env` again as `v2` snapshots before hardening them. - Hardened `docker-compose.yaml` with restart policies, `init: true`, graceful stop periods, and core service healthchecks, while keeping remote-access port exposure unchanged. - Moved compose-managed secrets into `.env` and added `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`, `WEBUI_SECRET_KEY`, and the existing `N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY` there. - Deliberately did **not** switch `n8n` to Postgres in this pass, to avoid silently stranding the existing SQLite-backed state. - Updated Apollo control docs to record the hardening decisions and next validation steps. - Backed up the core project files again as `v3` snapshots before rewrit
